name: Aeroblast
description: A wind gust that deals 1 damage and 1 Knockback in a line.
description2: A wind gust that deals 2 damage and 2 Knockback in a line.

name: Battle Cry
description: Give all familiars in an area +2 Damage.
description2: Give all familiars +3 Damage.

name: Bestow Wisdom
description: Give +1 Intelligence to a unit.
description2: Give +1 Intelligence and +2 mana to a unit.

name: Bloom
description: Give 5 mana to allies in an area.
description2: Give 5 mana to allies in a large area.

name: Bramble Burst
description: Explode a familiar causing damage to all adjacent units and spawning brambles.
description2: Explode a familiar causing damage to all units in range 2 and spawning brambles.

name: Call the Wind
description: Blow all units back one tile.
description2: Blow all units back three tiles. Allies are immune to knockback damage during this.

name: Cha Cha Slide
description: Deal 10 Knockback to all units in a random direction. Allies are immune to Thorns, tile and Knockback damage during this effect.
description2: Deal 10 Knockback to all units in a random direction. Allies gain +3 temporary Thorns and are immune to Thorns, tile and Knockback damage during this effect.

name: Cheerlead
description: Make a target unit The Alpha. PASSIVE: The first spell The Alpha casts each turn is cast twice.
description2: Make a target unit The Alpha. PASSIVE: The first spell The Alpha casts each turn is cast twice. (This spell costs less.)

name: Control Air
description: Blow a unit ten tiles away from you. This doesn't deal Knockback damage.
description2: Blow a unit ten tiles away from you. This doesn't deal Knockback damage. (This spell costs less and has infinite range.)

name: Control Plants
description: Create a tall grass tile, then all enemies on grass element tiles take 1 damage.
description2: Create a tall grass tile, then all enemies on grass element tiles take 1 damage and gain Poison 1.

name: Control Water
description: Create a water tile, then all allies on water element tiles heal 2 HP.
description2: Create a water tile, then all allies on water element tiles heal 2 HP and have their debuffs cleansed.

name: Death Metal
description: A song that explodes a random enemy. If this hits a boss, it instead inflicts Fear.
description2: A song that explodes a random enemy. If this hits a boss, it instead inflicts Fear. Inflict Madness on each other enemy.

name: Encourage
description: Give a familiar an extra turn after this one.
description2: Give a familiar an extra turn after this one. (This spell costs less and has increased range.)

name: Entangle
description: Entangle units in an area.
description2: Entangle units in an area and spawn bramble tiles.

name: Flower Feet
description: Move 3 tiles. Plant flowers as you move.
description2: Move 5 tiles. Plant flowers as you move and where you end up.

name: Flutter
description: Fly over 3 tiles.
description2: Fly over 3-4 tiles.

name: Form of the Elk
description: Enter Elk Form, gaining +8 Speed, -2 Intelligence, -2 Constitution, and Trample 3. You ignore tile effects while moving. Your basic attack becomes Antler Swipe and this becomes Prance.
description2: Enter Elk Form, gaining +8 Speed and Trample 3. You ignore tile effects while moving. Your basic attack becomes Antler Swipe+ and this becomes Prance+.

name: Form of the Mockingbird
description: Enter Mockingbird Form, gaining Flying movement, +2 Luck, and -2 Strength. Your basic attack becomes Mock Song and this becomes Tease.
description2: Enter Mockingbird Form, gaining Flying movement and +2 Luck. Your basic attack becomes Mock Song+ and this becomes Tease+.

name: Form of the Monkey
description: Enter Monkey Form, gaining +2 Dexterity, +2 Luck, -2 Constitution, and -2 Charisma. Your basic attack becomes Throw Poop and this becomes Monkey Toss.
description2: Enter Monkey Form, gaining +2 Dexterity and +2 Luck. Your basic attack becomes Throw Poop and this becomes Monkey Toss+.

name: Form of the Raccoon
description: Enter Raccoon Form, gaining +2 Intelligence, and -2 Strength. Your basic attack becomes Pilfer and this becomes Scavenge.
description2: Enter Raccoon Form, gaining +2 Intelligence and +2 Luck. Your basic attack becomes Pilfer and this becomes Scavenge+.

name: Form of the Squirrel
description: Spawn squirrels on each adjacent tile, then enter Squirrel Form. Your basic attack becomes Chitter and this becomes Birth Squirrel.
description2: Spawn squirrels on each adjacent tile, then enter Squirrel Form. Your basic attack becomes Chitter and this becomes Birth Squirrel+. (This spell costs less.)

name: Form of the Tree
description: Enter Tree Form, gaining -2 Intelligence, +5 Shield, and Brace 2. You become Immobile and immune to Knockback. Your basic attack becomes Timber and this becomes Synthesize.
description2: Enter Tree Form, gaining -2 Intelligence, +5 Shield, and Brace 4. You become Immobile and immune to Knockback. Your basic attack becomes Timber and this becomes Synthesize+.

name: Form of the Turtle
description: Enter Turtle Form, getting +2 Constitution, +10 Shield, -2 Intelligence, and -2 Speed. Your basic attack becomes Head Bash and this becomes Harden Shell.
description2: Enter Turtle Form, getting +2 Constitution, +10 Shield, and -2 Intelligence. Your basic attack becomes Head Bash and this becomes Harden Shell+.

name: Form of the Wolf
description: Enter Wolf Form, gaining +2 Strength, +2 Speed, -2 Luck, and -2 Intelligence. Your basic attack becomes Wolf Claws and this becomes Pounce.
description2: Enter Wolf Form, gaining +2 Strength, +2 Speed, -2 Luck, and -2 Intelligence. Your basic attack becomes Wolf Claws+ and this becomes Pounce+.

name: From the Trees!
description: Summon a random animal that falls from the sky onto a random enemy, dealing damage.
description2: Summon a random animal that falls from the sky onto a random enemy, dealing more damage. (This spell costs less.)

name: Grant Life
description: Give a unit All Stats Up. You get All Stats Down.
description2: Give a unit All Stats Up, Charge 2, and heal them 2. You get All Stats Down.

name: Harden Shell
description: Gain +1 Shield, +1 Thorns, and +1 temporary Brace.
description2: Gain +1 Shield, +1 Thorns, and +1 temporary Brace. (This spell costs less.)

name: Hydro Pump
description: Shoot a blast of water that deals 3 Knockback. This spell has recoil.
description2: Shoot a long blast of water that deals 10 Knockback. This spell has recoil.

name: Inspirational Song
description: Heal all allies and give them +1 Temporary Damage.
description2: Heal all allies and give them +2 Temporary Damage.

name: Lullaby
description: Inflicts Sleep on units in an area.
description2: Inflicts Sleep on units in an area. (This spell costs less and has increased range.)

name: Monkey Toss
description: Throw an adjacent unit to another tile. It takes damage if it's thrown onto something.
description2: Throw an adjacent unit to another tile. It takes damage if it's thrown onto something. (This spell costs less.)

name: Nature's Blessing
description: Grow tall grass tiles in an area and give units in that area +3 Diminishing Health Regeneration.
description2: Grow tall grass tiles in an area and give units in that area +3 Diminishing Health Regeneration. (This spell costs less and has infinite range.)

name: Plant Mushroom
description: Spawn a glowing mushroom that restores mana to nearby units on its turn.
description2: Spawn a glowing mushroom anywhere that restores mana and health to nearby units on its turn.

name: Promote
description: The next familiar you spawn becomes a champion.
description2: The next familiar you spawn becomes an elite.

name: Protection
description: Give a familiar +1 Holy Shield.
description2: Give familiars in a large area +1 Holy Shield.

name: Resummon Crow
description: Summon a new crow. Castable only if your crow is dead.
description2: Summon a crow.

name: Safety Dance
description: Give all allies +1 Shield.
description2: Give all allies +2 Shield.

name: Serenade
description: Give Health Regeneration 1 to units in an area.
description2: Give Health Regeneration 1 to units in a larger area. (This spell costs less.)

name: Song of Spring
description: Spawn flower tiles in an area.
description2: Spawn flower tiles in a large area.

name: Squirrel Squad
description: Summon 5 baby squirrels.
description2: Summon 5 adult squirrels.

name: Stand By Me
description: Teleport an ally to you.
description2: Teleport any unit to you.

name: Step In
description: Swap positions with a familiar.
description2: Swap positions with any unit.

name: Summon Bear
description: Summon a bear.
description2: Summon a furious bear! (It has Fury Swipes.)
unlock: Complete The Caves with the Druid

name: Summon Caterpillar
description: Summon a caterpillar. It gains All Stats Up at the end of each turn. It becomes a moth at All Stats Up 5.
description2: Summon a caterpillar with All Stats Up 2. It gains All Stats Up at the end of each turn. It becomes a moth at All Stats Up 5.

name: Summon Snake
description: Summon a snake.
description2: Summon a slippery snake! (It has a 66% Dodge Chance.)

name: Summon Squirrel
description: Summon a squirrel.
description2: Summon a squirrel to any tile.

name: Summon Toad
description: Summon a toad.
description2: Summon a super toad! (It has more damage, health, and can move an extra time each turn)

name: Summon Turtle
description: Summon a turtle.
description2: Summon a turtle to any tile in range 6.

name: Thorny Feet
description: Move 3 tiles. Plant brambles as you move.
description2: Move 3 tiles. Plant brambles as you move. (This spell costs less.)

name: Throw Egg
description: Throw an egg. If the egg lands in an empty tile, it hatches into a random animal friend at the start of its second turn.
description2: Throw an egg. If the egg lands in an empty tile, it hatches into a random animal friend at the start of its first turn.

name: War Cry
description: Each familiar attacks their closest enemy immediately if they can.
description2: Your allies and familiars all attack their closest enemy immediately if they can.

name: We Are the Champions
description: Each familiar gains All Stats Up 2 and heals to full. (Castable once per battle.)
description2: Each familiar gains All Stats Up 2 and heals to full. (This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per battle.)

name: We Will Rock You
description: Inflict Petrify on a familiar and give it +6 Shield.
description2: Inflict Petrify on a familiar and give it +6 Shield and +2 Thorns.

name: Windy Step
description: Give a unit +1 Bonus Move.
description2: Give a unit +1 Bonus Move and +1 Speed. They take their next turn earlier.
